description_long: This object is a portable radio receiver with a retro design, featuring a sturdy black handle on top for easy carrying. The front face is divided into two main sections: a left side with a blue-tinted panel housing two control knobs and a right side with a large, circular black speaker grille set in an orange panel. The top surface includes several black and orange buttons or dials, likely for tuning and volume control. The back of the radio is mostly white with a rectangular black accent, possibly a battery compartment or access panel. The sides are orange with small black mesh areas, likely for ventilation or additional speakers.
description: A retro-style portable radio receiver with a black handle, orange and blue front panels, and a prominent speaker grille.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue control panel with two knobs, large black speaker grille, and the top row of buttons.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the orange body, black handle, and a small black mesh area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a mostly white panel with a black accent, and the top buttons visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the orange body, handle, and a small portion of the blue front panel.
